title: bauhinia affinis
intro: Bauhinia affinis, also known as the Himalayan orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Bauhinia affinis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant is typically prepared into herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
